sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed after clicking (42, 30). I need to verify which token was toggled.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking (42, 30)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Current token state:")
h_tokens = []
v_tokens = []
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] <= 10 and n['color'] in ('B', 'w'):
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        if min_r == 42:
            h_tokens.append((n['color'], min_c))
        elif min_r >= 44:
            v_tokens.append((n['color'], min_c))

h_tokens.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
v_tokens.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])

print(f"H: {[c for c, _ in h_tokens]}")
print(f"V: {[c for c, _ in v_tokens]}")

# Compare with before
if last_transition:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    print("\nBefore:")
    for n in before_seg:
        if n['pixels'] <= 10 and n['color'] in ('B', 'w'):
            min_r = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
            min_c = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
            if min_r in (42, 44):
                print(f"  color={n['color']}, row={min_r}, col={min_c}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
